notes: Classic server-rendered HTML. Semantic structure, no Shadow DOM, no SPA. Search form is the primary interactive element. Navigation through sidebar and top tabs.

endpoints.label: Search Wikipedia
endpoints.description: Global search form with text input and submit button

endpoints.label: Main Navigation Tabs
endpoints.description: Top tabs: Main Page, Contents, Current Events, Random Article, About, Donate

endpoints.label: Language Selector
endpoints.description: Interlanguage links to switch Wikipedia language editions

endpoints.label: Featured Article Links
endpoints.description: Links to featured content on the main page (Today's Featured Article, Did You Know, etc.)

endpoints.label: Log In / Create Account
endpoints.description: Personal tools login link in top-right corner
